name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ /\ states[i] = "thinking"
        /\ forks[i] = 0
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        /\ forks' = forks
   \/ /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ forks[i] = 0
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
   \/ /\ states[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks[i] = i
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
   \/ /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ forks[i] = i
        /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        /\ forks' = forks

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

====

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]
      /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ offsets[i] = offsets[i] + \E j \in 1..N : (clocks[j] - clocks[i]) \div N

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

====

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 1
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 2
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn[1] = 2
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn[2] = 1
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
      /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

====

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}

Next == 
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants = 1
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ wants' = 0
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants = 0
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ wants' = 1
  \/ /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
        /\ \A n \in Node : \A m \in Node : counts[n][m] = 0

Next == /\ \A n \in Node : \A m \in Node : counts[n][m] \in Nat
        /\ \A n \in Node : \A m \in Node : counts[n][m] = 0
        /\ \E n \in Node : \E m \in Node : counts[n][m] = counts[n][m] + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>

====
